function.name: hasegawa_mima_linear_check_converge_dt
function.description: Conduct a Hasegawa-Mima linear plasma turbulence simulation and evaluate temporal resolution convergence by comparing against analytical solution. Returns {"refined_parameter": str, "current_value": float, "RMSE": float, "is_converged": bool, "accumulated_cost": int, "The cost of the solver simulating the environment": int, "wall_time_exceeded": bool}.

dt.description: Current time step size for numerical integration
